assumptionRegistry.assumption: M26 is the active handoff milestone while governance checks run
assumptionRegistry.invalidationSignal: active milestone changes before handoff queue closes
assumptionRegistry.verificationPlan: assert plan.activeMilestone and goal_state activeMilestoneId both equal M26

assumptionRegistry.assumption: M26 baseline and execution reports remain the required preconditions for handoff
assumptionRegistry.invalidationSignal: upstream M26 report labels or schema contracts change
assumptionRegistry.verificationPlan: require baseline/execution report labels and ok=true in gate

assumptionRegistry.assumption: Reviewer-facing handoff references live in PROGRAM_PLAN/SUBMISSION/COVERAGE/USAGE
assumptionRegistry.invalidationSignal: official handoff docs move to a different file set
assumptionRegistry.verificationPlan: enforce token checks for command/artifact synchronization across four docs

assumptionRegistry.assumption: Queue closure for M26 can be inferred from PRG-263 status plus open-row shape
assumptionRegistry.invalidationSignal: additional M26 planned/in_progress/blocked rows are introduced
assumptionRegistry.verificationPlan: allow only two valid shapes: PRG-263 open alone (pre-close) or no open rows (post-close)

assumptionRegistry.assumption: Final rehearsal report remains the canonical release-readiness signal
assumptionRegistry.invalidationSignal: release-readiness source of truth moves away from final_rehearsal report
assumptionRegistry.verificationPlan: require out/final_rehearsal/report.json label and consistency with PRG-263 state

decisionRegistry.chosenOption: Wire m26-governance-handoff-check into ci to prevent post-polish drift
decisionRegistry.decision: Make M26 governance target a mandatory CI gate
decisionRegistry.reversalCondition: if handoff checks move to a dedicated release workflow
tradeoffs: con: tighter coupling to handoff docs/artifacts

decisionRegistry.chosenOption: Generate deterministic report with command set and SHA256 artifact manifest
decisionRegistry.decision: Publish machine-readable handoff package with artifact hashes
decisionRegistry.reversalCondition: if artifact attestation is delegated to an external release system

alternativesConsidered: close all risks when gates pass
keep risks only in prose docs
decisionRegistry.chosenOption: Embed residual-risk ledger in M26 governance report
decisionRegistry.decision: Track residual risks explicitly even after gate success
decisionRegistry.reversalCondition: if risk tracking is fully centralized elsewhere
tradeoffs: pro: clearer boundary between solved and remaining risks

decisionRegistry.chosenOption: Validate active M26 milestone while requiring queue closure consistency
decisionRegistry.decision: Keep one-active-milestone guardrail through handoff completion
decisionRegistry.reversalCondition: if plan constraints are changed to allow no active milestone
tradeoffs: con: completion semantics rely on queue state

decisionRegistry.chosenOption: Require PRG-263 command mapping in step_execution_map.json
decisionRegistry.decision: Use execution map as canonical replay path for PRG-263
decisionRegistry.reversalCondition: if autopilot mechanism is replaced by another orchestrator

residualRiskLedger.mitigation: Keep M26 governance check in CI with doc token assertions
residualRiskLedger.risk: Documentation may drift from executable handoff command path over time
Artifact bundle can become stale after additional tracker or doc edits

residualRiskLedger.mitigation: Target reruns final_rehearsal_check.py before governance assertions
residualRiskLedger.risk: Queue state and release-readiness can diverge if final rehearsal is not refreshed

residualRiskLedger.mitigation: Treat this as explicit product limitation in docs/COVERAGE.md
residualRiskLedger.risk: Project remains scoped to internal corpus and validators, not full-world dance exhaustiveness

residualRiskLedger.mitigation: Close active queue, rerun final rehearsal, and confirm queuedGapCount=0
residualRiskLedger.risk: Release readiness may remain false while PRG-263 or other queue work is open
